title: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 02 May 2025
section_path: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 02 May 2025
section_path_text: Best Oasis Weekly Recycling Market Report, 02 May 2025
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 03/05/2025
The ship recycling market remained weak across all major destinations, with limited movement and sentiment largely unchanged. Source: Best Oasis Limited

Linked asset: 2025-05-03_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-26-April-02-May-2025.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/demolition/pdfs/2025-05-03_Weekly-Ship-Recycling-Report-26-April-02-May-2025.pdf

[Page 1]
Weekly Ship Recycling Report
26 April - 02 May 2025
Visit : www.best-oasis.com Head Office: 3201, Saba Tower 1, Cluster E, Jumeirah Lake Towers, Dubai, U.A.E
Email: bol@bol.ae Contact: +971 4575 4667

[Page 2]
Highlights of the week
The ship recycling market remained weak across all major destinations, with limited movement and sentiment largely unchanged. In India, the downward
trend continued as safeguard measures failed to revive demand, and financial stress weighed heavily on both mills and buyers.
